name: Sourdough Maple Walnut Bread ABM
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring all ingredients to room temperature.
2. Pour the ingredients into the bread machine, in order, except for the chopped walnuts and raisins.
3. Set the baking control at 10 o'clock.
4. Select "white bread" setting and press Start.
5. Add the chopped walnuts and raisins when the timer beeps (approximately 88 minutes into the cycle).
6. Tested successfully in a DAK 1-1/2 lb R2D2 bread machine.
7. Sylvia's comment: The recipe produced a lovely loaf with no modifications, and it was well-received by children.
